'''Sreas''' was a demanding but fair officer in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. In late [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Sreas commanded the [[fleet shuttle]] ''[[Tampion]]'' carrying [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]].

With information provided by [[Tig Peramis]], a [[Yevetha]]n force, which included the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] [[Imperator (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Imperator'']], ambushed ''Tampion'' 91 [[Light-year/Legends|light-years]] outside of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], while en route to the rendezvous. When the shuttle was boarded, Sreas attempted to fight off the Yevethan troops, but only accidentally shot Solo in the right arm before taking a fatal [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot to the chest.

His corpse was brought into the holding cell alongside Solo and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Barth]], where Barth told Solo of Sreas's children and wife, and the holo of her that he always carried. Barth also stated that Sreas was a collector of glass animals.
